page_metadata.biotools__summary: ClusterCAD provides a database and web-based toolkit designed to enable researchers to harness the potential of type I modular polyketide synthases and nonribosomal peptide synthetases for combinatorial biosynthesis.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ClusterCAD provides a database and web-based toolkit designed to enable researchers to harness the potential of type I modular polyketide synthases and nonribosomal peptide synthetases for combinatorial biosynthesis.
